description_long: This kiosk features a semi-enclosed, open-plan layout with multiple partition walls arranged on a rectangular base. The partitions are primarily white, with some panels displaying colorful printed graphics and images, suggesting informational or promotional content. The structure lacks a traditional roof, instead utilizing vertical panels to define its boundaries and create separate zones. The kiosk appears to be designed for walk-in interaction, such as an exhibition booth or information stand, with clear entry points and open sightlines. The materials appear to be lightweight, likely a combination of laminated panels and printed boards, suitable for temporary installation in urban environments. The overall design is modern and minimalist, emphasizing functionality and visual communication.
description: A modern, open-plan kiosk with white partition walls and printed graphic panels, designed for walk-in interaction. The structure is roofless and features multiple entry points, suitable for exhibitions or information displays.
description_view_0: From this angle, the kiosk's open central area and several white partition walls with printed graphics are visible, highlighting the main entry and display zones.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the side partitions and the variety of printed panels, showing more of the internal layout and the separation between display areas.
description_view_2: Here, the rear and side partitions are prominent, with visible graphics and a clear view of the open, accessible central space.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the opposite side, focusing on the entry points and the arrangement of the partition walls, with printed panels facing outward.
attribute_signage_type: printed signs and graphic panels integrated into the partition walls, featuring images and text; no illuminated or digital signage visible
attribute_door_configuration: none; open entryways between partition panels
attribute_roof_design: none; open-air with no overhead covering
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with functional, modular partitions and clean lines
